idea.hook: What if Earth doubled in size?
facts: It would be 1.2 times larger than Jupiter's moon Ganymede, with a surface area equivalent to 240 million football fields
The increased gravity would be 2.5 times stronger than Earth's, equivalent to the weight of 5.5 NY-to-LA flights stacked on top of you
The enlarged planet would have an atmosphere 3.7 times thicker than our current one, with air pressure similar to being 1,000 feet underwater
idea.payoff: and we still don't know how life would evolve on a super-sized Earth
idea.title: Earth 2x 🌎
idea.description: Imagine waking up to a world where Earth has doubled in size 🌎! The consequences would be mind-boggling, with gravity, atmosphere, and life as we know it drastically altered 🤯. Could humanity survive on a super-sized planet, and what would be the implications for our daily lives? 🤔

scenes.text: What if Earth DOUBLED in size?
scenes.visual: A vibrant Earth slowly grows larger in the vastness of space, transitioning into a much larger version of itself.

scenes.text: 1.2x larger than Ganymede. Surface: 240 MILLION football fields.
scenes.visual: A super-sized Earth rotates, with Jupiter's moon Ganymede appearing briefly for comparison. Then, an overlay showing a vast grid of football fields covering the planet's surface.

scenes.text: Gravity: 2.5x stronger! Like 5.5 NY-to-LA flights stacked on you.
scenes.visual: Abstract visual of a heavy force pressing down. Perhaps simplified human silhouettes struggling, or heavy objects rapidly falling towards a large planet surface. A stack of stylized airplane icons could animate onto the screen.
A cutaway view of the enlarged Earth showing dense, layered atmosphere. Transition to an underwater scene with increasing depth indicators and dark blue hues, emphasizing pressure.

scenes.text: How would LIFE EVOLVE on a SUPER-SIZED Earth? We don't know.
scenes.visual: A mysterious, alien-looking super-sized Earth, possibly shrouded in a thick atmosphere, with silhouettes of fantastical, adapted life forms hinting at evolution. A large question mark subtly appears over the planet.
